title: Texas War of independence
subject: Texas War of independence
program_outcome: This syllabus provides an overview of the Texas War of Independence, focusing on its political causes, key battles, folk lore, and lasting effects.

classes.title: Introduction to the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class introduces the historical context and key figures involved in the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Describe the historical context of the Texas War of Independence
Identify key figures involved in the conflict
enabling: Explain the geopolitical situation in Texas prior to the war
List major political and military figures
Discuss the role of settlers and indigenous peoples

classes.title: Political Causes of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class examines the political causes leading up to the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Explain the political causes of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify the key political tensions between Mexico and Texas settlers
Discuss the role of the Mexican government in escalating conflicts
Analyze the impact of immigration and land policies

classes.title: Major Battles of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class covers the major battles and military strategies of the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Identify and describe major battles of the Texas War of Independence
Explain the outcomes of these battles
enabling: List the major battles and their dates
Discuss the strategies used by both Texan and Mexican forces
Analyze the significance of each battle's outcome

classes.title: Folk Lore and Myths of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class explores the folk lore and myths that emerged from the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Describe key folk lore and myths from the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify popular stories and characters from the war
Discuss how these stories have been passed down through generations
Analyze the role of folk lore in shaping public perception of the war

classes.title: Effects and Legacy of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class examines the immediate and long-term effects of the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Explain the immediate effects of the Texas War of Independence
Discuss the long-term legacy of the war on Texas and the United States
enabling: Identify changes in territorial control following the war
Discuss the impact on Texas's path to statehood
Analyze the war's influence on U.S.-Mexico relations
